title: [skip-ci] Update dawidd6/action-send-mail action to v16
body:

### [`v12`](https://redirect.github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/releases/tag/v12)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/compare/v11...v12)

### Possible Breaking Change

`from` input now needs to be in one of those forms:

- `Plain Simple Name <user@example.com>`
- `user@example.com`

#### What's Changed

- build(deps): bump minimatch from 3.1.3 to 3.1.5 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​265](https://redirect.github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/pull/265)
- Misc. fixes by [@​felfert](https://redirect.github.com/felfert) in [#​267](https://redirect.github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/pull/267)
- build(deps): bump nodemailer from 8.0.1 to 8.0.2 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​269](https://redirect.github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/pull/269)
- node\_modules: update by [@​dawidd6](https://redirect.github.com/dawidd6) in [#​270](https://redirect.github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/pull/270)

#### New Contributors

- [@​felfert](https://redirect.github.com/felfert) made their first contribution in [#​267](https://redirect.github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/pull/267)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/compare/v11...v12>

comments.body: tmt tests failed for commit a1734fb02bf129c3524b06d1c27a13194d217b0d. @lsm5, @psss, @thrix please check.
[NON-BLOCKING] Packit jobs failed. @containers/packit-build please check. Everyone else, feel free to ignore.
LGTM. Looks like we use it in 4 actions, we can just keep an eye on failures on the action, and revert/debug if it fails. No other way to test it.
